summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. PR #85611 is routed to central security handling because the validator identified it as security-sensitive; all other outcomes are non-mutating because the job disables merge, fix PRs, post-merge closeout, instant close, and low-signal closeout.
